chapter_title.en: Chapter on Prohibition of Shedding Blood and Taking Wealth Unlawfully, the Prohibition of Engaging in the Impermissible, and Repentance From Killing Whether Intentional or Accidental

text: "قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "مَنْ قُتِلَ دُونَ مَالِهِ فَهُوَ شَهِيدٌ" " قَالَ "وَ قَالَ "لَوْ كُنْتُ أَنَا لَتَرَكْتُ اَلْمَالَ وَ لَمْ أُقَاتِلْ " ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5161 - Al-Alaa narrated from Muhammad ibn Muslim from one of the two Imams (peace be upon them), who said:
"The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
'Whoever is killed defending his wealth is a martyr.'"
Imam (as) also said: "If it were me, I would have abandoned the wealth and not fought."
